textByHashes.563524d596a9d3609dd6a3e06cabe9f140ec5958: Why should I, Tolna, be trapped in such a wretched place?
textByHashes.7df52b49fdaa85b6083a7cee628122eeefaabc69: Arrghh, It's not fair! Feel my ANGER!
textByHashes.0cac4a57d377b59a0ab59426cb56faf3d69d7974: It's so quiet and dark. I FEAR I may never escape this horrid place.
textByHashes.212e9996154493d6747f60d91f11c85495c1778f: Where am I? How long have I been here? Am I still the person I once was?
textByHashes.0ee8b8c2c76d1a5aacf461b0710d6752a5933a23: Oh why am I so CONFUSED?
textByHashes.80a313ef06d3eebff551b411d7e21b6f5b881c54: What's the point? No-one will ever help me.
textByHashes.82cf583ed27d70dd7159e8f888ee6a36b20c4bab: I'm not worth anything. Will anyone ever combat my HOPELESSNESS?
